reviews.comment:
"Solo efectivo e infinia" me tiró el playero. Última parada antes de entrar a la ruta del desierto, cierra por todos lados. Se aplaude la argentineada.

(Translated by Google)
"Cash only and infinity," the beach attendant told me. The last stop before entering the desert route, it's closed on all sides. The Argentinean thing is applauded.
